pageProps.content:
["$r",null,null,{"children":[["$r","h2",null,{"id":"收录范围","children":"收录范围"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"Fedora 38 及更旧版本已不再受官方支持，Fedora 官方已将 Fedora 38 及更旧版本的软件仓库从主镜像中移除，并转移至了 archive 镜像中。"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["故 Fedora 38 及更旧版本无法使用所选择的镜像。请使用默认配置文件，以使 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"yum"}]," / ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"dnf"}]," 自动获取可用的镜像源。"]}],"
",["$r","h2",null,{"id":"使用方法","children":"使用方法"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["Fedora 默认使用 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"https://zh.fedoracommunity.org/2018/04/05/fedora-secures-package-delivery.html","rel":"nofollow","children":"Metalink"}]," 给出推荐的镜像列表，保证用户使用的镜像仓库足够新，并且能够尽快拿到安全更新，从而提供更好的安全性。所以通常情况下使用默认配置即可，无需更改配置文件。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"由于 Metalink 需要从国外的 Fedora 项目服务器上获取元信息，所以对于校园内网、无国外访问等特殊情况，metalink 并不适用，此时可以如下修改配置文件。"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"Fedora 的软件源配置文件可以有多个，其中："}],"
",["$r","ul",null,{"children":["
",["$r","li",null,{"children":["系统默认的 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"fedora"}]," 仓库配置文件为 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/yum.repos.d/fedora.repo"}]]}],"
",["$r","li",null,{"children":["系统默认的 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"updates"}]," 仓库配置文件为 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/yum.repos.d/fedora-updates.repo"}]]}],"
"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["将上述两个文件先做个备份，根据 Fedora 系统版本分别替换为下面内容，之后通过 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"sudo dnf makecache"}]," 命令更新本地缓存，即可使用所选择的软件源镜像。"]}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"命令替换","children":"命令替换"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["用以下命令替换 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/yum.repos.d"}]," 下的文件"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-0","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"手动替换","children":"手动替换"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["$r","strong",null,{"children":[["$r","code",null,{"children":"fedora"}]," 仓库 (/etc/yum.repos.d/fedora.repo)"]}]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-1","codeLanguage":"ini"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["$r","strong",null,{"children":[["$r","code",null,{"children":"updates"}]," 仓库 (/etc/yum.repos.d/fedora-updates.repo)"]}]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-2","codeLanguage":"ini"}]]}]

compiledTemplates.template-0:
{code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b(t.v(t.f("sudo",c,p,0)));t.b("sed -e 's|^metalink=|#metalink=|g' \");t.b("
" + i);t.b("    -e 's|^#baseurl=http://download.example/pub/fedora/linux|baseurl=");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("|g' \");t.b("
" + i);t.b("    -i.bak \");t.b("
" + i);t.b("    /etc/yum.repos.d/fedora.repo \");t.b("
" + i);t.b("    /etc/yum.repos.d/fedora-updates.repo");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
compiledTemplates.template-1:
{code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("[fedora]");t.b("
" + i);t.b("name=Fedora $releasever - $basearch");t.b("
" + i);t.b("baseurl=");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("/releases/$releasever/Everything/$basearch/os/");t.b("
" + i);t.b("#metalink=https://mirrors.fedoraproject.org/metalink?repo=fedora-$releasever&arch=$basearch");t.b("
" + i);t.b("enabled=1");t.b("
" + i);t.b("countme=1");t.b("
" + i);t.b("metadata_expire=7d");t.b("
" + i);t.b("repo_gpgcheck=0");t.b("
" + i);t.b("type=rpm");t.b("
" + i);t.b("gpgcheck=1");t.b("
" + i);t.b("gpgkey=file:///etc/pki/rpm-gpg/RPM-GPG-KEY-fedora-$releasever-$basearch");t.b("
" + i);t.b("skip_if_unavailable=False");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
compiledTemplates.template-2:
{code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("[updates]");t.b("
" + i);t.b("name=Fedora $releasever - $basearch - Updates");t.b("
" + i);t.b("baseurl=");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("/updates/$releasever/Everything/$basearch/");t.b("
" + i);t.b("#metalink=https://mirrors.fedoraproject.org/metalink?repo=updates-released-f$releasever&arch=$basearch");t.b("
" + i);t.b("enabled=1");t.b("
" + i);t.b("countme=1");t.b("

" + i);t.b("type=rpm");t.b("

" + i);t.b("gpgkey=file:///etc/pki/rpm-gpg/RPM-GPG-KEY-fedora-$releasever-$basearch");t.b("
" + i);t.b("skip_if_unavailable=False");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
